results.title: Transformers.js
results.description: State-of-the-art Machine Learning for the web. Run 🤗 Transformers directly in your browser, with no need for a server!

results.title: Wandler (llmstxt)
results.description: Wandler is a TypeScript library that allows you to run AI models directly in your browser using transformers.js, offering a private, free, and open-source solution for local AI inference.

results.title: Transformers
results.description: 🤗 Transformers: State-of-the-art Machine Learning for Pytorch, TensorFlow, and JAX.

results.title: Transformers
results.description: Transformers is a Python library by Hugging Face that provides state-of-the-art pre-trained models for Natural Language Processing, computer vision, and audio tasks, alongside tools for training, inference, and deployment.

results.title: impress.js
results.description: impress.js is a presentation framework based on CSS3 transforms and transitions, inspired by Prezi.com, for creating modern, non-linear presentations.

results.title: X-Transformers
results.description: X-Transformers is a Python library that provides a concise yet fully-featured implementation of various transformer architectures, including encoder-decoder, decoder-only, and encoder-only models, incorporating promising experimental features from recent research papers like Flash Attention and Memory Transformers.

results.title: Transformers (llmstxt)
results.description: The Hugging Face Transformers Trainer API simplifies model training and enables hyperparameter search using various backends like Optuna, SigOpt, Ray Tune, and Weights & Biases.

results.title: TRL
results.description: Train transformer language models with reinforcement learning.

results.title: spaCy Transformers
results.description: 🛸 Use pretrained transformers like BERT, XLNet and GPT-2 in spaCy

results.title: TransformerLens
results.description: A library for mechanistic interpretability of GPT-2 style language models, allowing users to load models, access internal activations, and modify them during runtime.

results.title: Shift Traverse JS
results.description: Shift Traverser provides traversal and replacement functionality for Shift format ASTs, modernizing and updating the original Constellation's shift-traverse for Shift 2018.

results.title: KTransformers
results.description: KTransformers is a flexible, Python-centric framework designed to enhance Hugging Face Transformers with advanced kernel optimizations and parallelism strategies for cutting-edge LLM inference.

results.title: Matter.js
results.description: Matter.js is a 2D physics engine built in JavaScript for the web. It provides a comprehensive API for creating realistic physics simulations and interactions.

results.title: Satellite.js
results.description: A JavaScript library for satellite propagation and coordinate transforms using TLEs or OMM, providing SGP4/SDP4 calculations for web applications.

results.title: Class Transformer
results.description: Decorator-based transformation, serialization, and deserialization between objects and classes.

results.title: karabiner.ts
results.description: karabiner.ts is a TypeScript library that simplifies writing complex modifications for Karabiner-Elements, allowing users to configure keyboard remappings with structured code instead of raw JSON.

results.title: Driver.js
results.description: Driver.js is a lightweight, highly customizable vanilla JavaScript engine for driving user focus on web pages, enabling feature introductions, highlighting elements, and more without external dependencies.

results.title: Turn.js
results.description: Turn.js is a JavaScript library that creates a realistic page-flipping effect for HTML5 content, ideal for magazines, books, and catalogs.

results.title: Adapters
results.description: Adapters is an add-on library for HuggingFace Transformers, offering a unified interface for parameter-efficient and modular transfer learning with over 10 adapter methods integrated into 20+ Transformer models.

results.title: Matter.js
results.description: A TypeScript/JavaScript implementation of the complete Matter protocol, enabling the creation of Matter-compatible devices, bridges, and controllers for smart home IoT products.

results.title: Transformers PHP
results.description: TransformersPHP brings state-of-the-art machine learning models to PHP, offering a familiar API to Python's Transformers library for tasks like text generation, summarization, and translation using ONNX Runtime.

results.title: Paddle.js
results.description: Paddle.js is a web project for Baidu PaddlePaddle, an open-source deep learning framework designed to run pre-trained or transformed models directly in browsers with WebGL, WebGPU, or WebAssembly support, and also in Baidu Smartprogram and WX miniprogram.

results.title: Kokoro TTS
results.description: Kokoro TTS is a JavaScript library that enables the Kokoro 82 million parameter text-to-speech (TTS) model to run 100% locally in the browser, powered by Hugging Face Transformers.js.

results.title: Dry Transformer
results.description: Dry Transformer is a Ruby gem that provides a flexible and powerful way to transform data structures.

results.title: Stryker JS
results.description: StrykerJS is a mutation testing framework for JavaScript, designed to improve code quality by introducing mutations and ensuring tests catch them.

results.title: TransformerEngine
results.description: TransformerEngine is a library developed by NVIDIA for accelerating and optimizing Transformer models on NVIDIA GPUs.

results.title: Ts-Jest
results.description: A Jest transformer with source map support that lets you use Jest to test projects written in TypeScript.

results.title: GrapesJS
results.description: GrapesJS is a multi-purpose, Web Builder Framework that allows users to easily create drag & drop enabled builders for various HTML-like structures, designed to replace traditional WYSIWYG editors in CMS.

results.title: Test IT TMS Adapters Java
results.description: Test IT TMS Adapters Java provides integration for various Java testing frameworks like JUnit, TestNG, and Cucumber with the Test IT Test Management System.
